news.title:
Nifty 50 gained 5.5% this week, its best since Feb 2021. Eight stocks saw weekly gains over 10%.
Shriram Finance (+14.5%), Adani Enterprises (+13.3%), Axis Bank (+12.8%), Tata Motors PV (+11.7%), Bajaj Auto (+11.1%), Bajaj Finance (+11.2%), Eicher Motors (+10.5%), and Trent (+10%) led the rally.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 gained 5.5% this week, its best since Feb 2021. Eight stocks saw weekly gains over 10%.
Shriram Finance (+14.5%), Adani Enterprises (+13.3%), Axis Bank (+12.8%), Tata Motors PV (+11.7%), Bajaj Auto (+11.1%), Bajaj Finance (+11.2%), Eicher Motors (+10.5%), and Trent (+10%) led the rally.

news.title: Bajaj Auto Ltd rises for the fifth consecutive trading session.
news.summary: Bajaj Auto Ltd rises for the fifth consecutive trading session.

news.title:
ICICI Direct recommends Bajaj Auto and Reliance Industries for 3-month gains of up to 12% and 11% respectively.
Both stocks show strong technical setups, favorable risk-reward, and momentum indicators supporting trend reversals.
news.summary:
ICICI Direct recommends Bajaj Auto and Reliance Industries for 3-month gains of up to 12% and 11% respectively.
Both stocks show strong technical setups, favorable risk-reward, and momentum indicators supporting trend reversals.

news.title:
CLSA turns bullish on Indian equities, citing reduced geopolitical risks, valuations below 10-year averages, and improved risk-reward profiles.
Portfolio changes include exiting IT for defence, trimming Bajaj Auto/M&M, raising financials, and preferring Bajaj Finance over IndusInd Bank.
news.summary:
CLSA turns bullish on Indian equities, citing reduced geopolitical risks, valuations below 10-year averages, and improved risk-reward profiles.
Portfolio changes include exiting IT for defence, trimming Bajaj Auto/M&M, raising financials, and preferring Bajaj Finance over IndusInd Bank.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto Ltd. executed NSE block trade worth Rs. 64 cr for ~66,096 shares.
The trade occurred at Rs. 9,683.50 per share.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto Ltd. executed NSE block trade worth Rs. 64 cr for ~66,096 shares.
The trade occurred at Rs. 9,683.50 per share.

news.title:
BofA upgrades Bajaj Auto to Buy with a target price of ₹10,700, citing limited margin/EPS downgrade risks.
Factors include strong export exposure, easing 3-wheeler costs, and market-share gains from Pulsar refresh and new launches.
news.summary:
BofA upgrades Bajaj Auto to Buy with a target price of ₹10,700, citing limited margin/EPS downgrade risks.
Factors include strong export exposure, easing 3-wheeler costs, and market-share gains from Pulsar refresh and new launches.

news.title:
Maharashtra Scooters, once a scooter manufacturer, now functions as a CIC, holding stakes in Bajaj Group firms like Bajaj Auto, Bajaj Finance, and Bajaj Finserv.
It trades at a 55% holding discount, offers high margins, and provides indirect exposure to Bajaj's ecosystem but faces valuation, transparency, and tax challenges.
news.summary:
Maharashtra Scooters, once a scooter manufacturer, now functions as a CIC, holding stakes in Bajaj Group firms like Bajaj Auto, Bajaj Finance, and Bajaj Finserv.
It trades at a 55% holding discount, offers high margins, and provides indirect exposure to Bajaj's ecosystem but faces valuation, transparency, and tax challenges.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto's P/E is 28.3, below the industry's 30.8, indicating relative valuation.
The company's large-cap status and evolving ratings highlight its importance in India's equity market.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto's P/E is 28.3, below the industry's 30.8, indicating relative valuation.
The company's large-cap status and evolving ratings highlight its importance in India's equity market.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto reported March sales at 4.45 lakh units, near CNBC estimate of 4.49 lakh.
Exports rose 21% to 1.79 lakh units but missed monthly run rate; stock fell 1.8% to ₹8,740.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto reported March sales at 4.45 lakh units, near CNBC estimate of 4.49 lakh.
Exports rose 21% to 1.79 lakh units but missed monthly run rate; stock fell 1.8% to ₹8,740.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 68.2 crore for 76,049 shares.
The shares were traded at Rs. 8,965.50 each during the transaction.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 68.2 crore for 76,049 shares.
The shares were traded at Rs. 8,965.50 each during the transaction.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto's P/E ratio at 27.4 is below the industry's 30.7.
Despite price declines, Bajaj Auto outperforms Sensex long-term, showing resilience.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto's P/E ratio at 27.4 is below the industry's 30.7.
Despite price declines, Bajaj Auto outperforms Sensex long-term, showing resilience.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto posts Q3 revenue of INR 152.2bn (+19% y/y) with EBITDA margin at 20.8% (+60bp).
Electric vehicles contributed 25% of domestic revenue; exports crossed 500k units after 15 quarters.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto posts Q3 revenue of INR 152.2bn (+19% y/y) with EBITDA margin at 20.8% (+60bp).
Electric vehicles contributed 25% of domestic revenue; exports crossed 500k units after 15 quarters.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.
IREDA signs ECB deal worth ¥28B; Bajaj Auto's AAA rating reaffirmed by CARE Ratings.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.
IREDA signs ECB deal worth ¥28B; Bajaj Auto's AAA rating reaffirmed by CARE Ratings.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed CARE AAA (Stable) rating for Bajaj Auto Credit's Rs. 10,000 crore long-term bank facilities.
The credit rating update was disclosed by Bajaj Auto on March 31, 2026, under Regulation 30 compliance.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed CARE AAA (Stable) rating for Bajaj Auto Credit's Rs. 10,000 crore long-term bank facilities.
The credit rating update was disclosed by Bajaj Auto on March 31, 2026, under Regulation 30 compliance.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto stock drops over 10% from Feb 2026 highs, staying above 200-DMA.
The stock's correction suggests potential buying opportunity as it holds key support.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto stock drops over 10% from Feb 2026 highs, staying above 200-DMA.
The stock's correction suggests potential buying opportunity as it holds key support.

news.title:
Experts analyzed stocks: Jio Financial Services, IRCTC, L&T, Suzlon, Wipro, and Bajaj Auto on NDTV's 'Ask Profit'.
Buy: L&T, Suzlon; Hold: Jio Financial, IRCTC, Bajaj Auto; Avoid: Wipro. Analysts provided targets and stop-loss points.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bajaj Mobility AG achieves EUR 1B revenue in 2025, selling 209,704 units.
H2 2025 sales rose 60% vs H1; net profit EUR 590M, equity ratio at 24.3%.
news.summary:
Bajaj Mobility AG achieves EUR 1B revenue in 2025, selling 209,704 units.
H2 2025 sales rose 60% vs H1; net profit EUR 590M, equity ratio at 24.3%.

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
Accuracap Prime Fund and officials settled Sebi's AIF norms case for ₹21.75 lakh.
The fund breached corpus rules and overallocated to Bajaj Auto, violating AIF norms.
news.summary:
Accuracap Prime Fund and officials settled Sebi's AIF norms case for ₹21.75 lakh.
The fund breached corpus rules and overallocated to Bajaj Auto, violating AIF norms.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto may shift EV expansion out of Maharashtra over subsidy and permit issues.
The company is exploring Pantnagar and other states with clearer policy support.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto may shift EV expansion out of Maharashtra over subsidy and permit issues.
The company is exploring Pantnagar and other states with clearer policy support.
